meaning: n.与自己社会地位相等的人,邻居
examples: The Joneses make a big deal out of being "different."
Many people were holding down three jobs just to keep up with the Joneses.
On one hand, they want to keep up with the joneses and on the other hand, there's the snob effect.
The American super-rich are trying to keep up with the Gateses, not the Joneses.
Not to gain a competitive edge, but to simply keep up with the Joneses.
